Class ColumnMetaData

java.lang.Object
iu.dao.ColumnMetaData
class ColumnMetaData extends Object
Holds reflection- and annotation-derived metadata for a single mapped bean property of a JPA entity.

A property is mapped in one of two exclusive modes:

Column mode
The getter carries @Column. columnName is set to the annotation's name() value when non-blank, or to the UPPER_SNAKE_CASE conversion of the property name otherwise. sql equals columnName, selectAlias is null, and table is resolved from @Column.table().
SqlColumn mode
The getter carries @SqlColumn but not @Column. columnName and table are null. sql holds the raw SQL expression from SqlColumn.value(), and selectAlias is set to the UPPER_SNAKE_CASE form of the property name so it can be aliased in SELECT lists.

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    (package private) final jakarta.persistence.Column
    column
    The Column annotation on the getter, or null for SqlColumn properties.
    (package private) final String
    columnName
    The physical database column name used in INSERT, UPDATE, and WHERE clauses.
    (package private) final jakarta.persistence.Id
    id
    The Id annotation on the getter, or null when the property is not part of the entity's primary key.
    (package private) final PropertyDescriptor
    property
    The PropertyDescriptor from bean introspection that this metadata describes.
    (package private) final String
    propertyName
    The bean property name derived from the getter, e.g.
    (package private) final String
    selectAlias
    The AS alias emitted in a SELECT list for SqlColumn-mapped properties.
    (package private) final boolean
    spaceForNull
    true when null bound values for this property should be replaced with a single space character.
    (package private) final String
    sql
    The SQL fragment used to reference this property in a SELECT list.
    (package private) final edu.iu.dao.SqlColumn
    sqlColumn
    The SqlColumn annotation on the getter, or null for Column-mapped properties.
    (package private) final TableMetaData
    table
    The TableMetaData that owns this column's physical table, resolved from Column.table().

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    ColumnMetaData(PropertyDescriptor property, EntityMetaData entity)
    Constructs metadata for a single bean property.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    (package private) boolean
    isMappedColumn()
    Returns true when the property is mapped via Column (i.e. has a physical column name and table binding).
    (package private) boolean
    isPrimaryColumn()
    Returns true when the property is mapped via Column and belongs to the entity's primary table.
    (package private) Object
    normalizeArgument(Object value)
    Normalizes a bind-parameter value before it is passed to a JDBC statement.
    (package private) String
    reference()
    Returns the SQL reference for this column using the table's own alias.
    (package private) String
    reference(String aliasOverride)
    Returns the SQL reference for this column, optionally overriding the table alias.

    Methods inherited from class Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Field Details

    • property

      final PropertyDescriptor property
      The PropertyDescriptor from bean introspection that this metadata describes.

    • propertyName

      final String propertyName
      The bean property name derived from the getter, e.g. "myColumn" for getMyColumn().

    • columnName

      final String columnName
      The physical database column name used in INSERT, UPDATE, and WHERE clauses. Derived from Column.name() when non-blank; otherwise DaoUtils.camelToSnakeUpper(String) of propertyName. null for SqlColumn properties.

    • sql

      final String sql
      The SQL fragment used to reference this property in a SELECT list. For Column-mapped properties this equals columnName. For SqlColumn properties this is the raw expression from SqlColumn.value().

    • selectAlias

      final String selectAlias
      The AS alias emitted in a SELECT list for SqlColumn-mapped properties. Set to the UPPER_SNAKE_CASE form of propertyName. null for Column-mapped properties, which are identified by their physical column name.

    • id

      final jakarta.persistence.Id id
      The Id annotation on the getter, or null when the property is not part of the entity's primary key.

    • column

      final jakarta.persistence.Column column
      The Column annotation on the getter, or null for SqlColumn properties.

    • sqlColumn

      final edu.iu.dao.SqlColumn sqlColumn
      The SqlColumn annotation on the getter, or null for Column-mapped properties.

    • spaceForNull

      final boolean spaceForNull
      true when null bound values for this property should be replaced with a single space character. Inherits the entity-level flag from EntityMetaData.spaceForNull, or is set independently when the getter carries SpaceForNull.

    • table

      final TableMetaData table
      The TableMetaData that owns this column's physical table, resolved from Column.table(). null for SqlColumn properties, which have no physical table binding.

  • Constructor Details

    • ColumnMetaData

      ColumnMetaData(PropertyDescriptor property, EntityMetaData entity)
      Constructs metadata for a single bean property.

      The property's read method must carry either Column or SqlColumn. When Column is present it takes precedence and the SqlColumn branch is not entered.

      Parameters:
      property - the PropertyDescriptor to describe; must have a readable getter annotated with Column or SqlColumn
      entity - the owning entity metadata, used to resolve the TableMetaData and inherit the entity-level SpaceForNull flag

  • Method Details

    • reference

      String reference()
      Returns the SQL reference for this column using the table's own alias.

      Equivalent to reference(null).

      Returns:
      SQL reference string

    • reference

      String reference(String aliasOverride)
      Returns the SQL reference for this column, optionally overriding the table alias.

      For Column-mapped properties the result is alias.columnName, where alias is aliasOverride when non-null, or the table's own TableMetaData.alias otherwise. For SqlColumn properties (where table is null) no alias prefix is emitted; only sql is returned regardless of aliasOverride.

      Parameters:
      aliasOverride - table alias to use instead of the table's own alias, or null to use the default
      Returns:
      SQL reference string

    • isMappedColumn

      boolean isMappedColumn()
      Returns true when the property is mapped via Column (i.e. has a physical column name and table binding).
      Returns:
      true for Column-mapped properties

    • isPrimaryColumn

      boolean isPrimaryColumn()
      Returns true when the property is mapped via Column and belongs to the entity's primary table.
      Returns:
      true for primary-table Column-mapped properties

    • normalizeArgument

      Object normalizeArgument(Object value)
      Normalizes a bind-parameter value before it is passed to a JDBC statement.
      • Returns a single space (" ") when value is null and spaceForNull is true.
      • Converts Instant to Timestamp so that JDBC drivers receive a type they understand.
      • Returns value unchanged in all other cases.
      Parameters:
      value - raw property value; may be null
      Returns:
      normalized value suitable for a JDBC bind parameter
